news.summary: Redwire Corporation, a renowned global aerospace and defense technology leader (NYSE: RDW), disclosed that their Chairman and CEO, Peter Cannito, will be speaking at the Jefferies Virtual Space Summit on June 24, 2025, from 1:20-1:50 p.m. ET. Those interested can access the presentation at https://wsw.com/webcast/jeff326/rdw/1711710. Redwire Corporation (NYSE:RDW) specializes in aerospace and defense solutions.
news.headline: Redwire CEO to speak at Jefferies Virtual Space Summit on June 24, 2025 from 1:20-1:50 p.m. ET. Company symbol: NYSE: RDW.

news.summary: In Toronto, the WSIB strike continues into its second month as the OCEU/CUPE 1750 expresses optimism for positive developments. The union has written a formal letter to Labour Minister David Piccini and Treasury Board President Caroline Mulroney, requesting an end to government involvement in negotiations and seeking assistance in achieving a just outcome for the labor conflict. A recent information picket outside Minister Piccini’s Seniors Seminar saw participation from union members on Thursday.
news.headline: OCEU sends letter to ministers & discuss with Labour Minister Piccini amid WSIB strike. Urges end to interference.
ISRAELI MILITARY SAYS IT HAS COMPLETED ANOTHER WAVE OF STRIKES ON MISSILE LAUNCH SITES IN WESTERN IRAN IN RECENT HOURS

news.summary: Aduro has successfully completed its over-allotment option, securing an additional US$1.2 million in funds through the issuance of more shares and warrants. The funds will be allocated towards supporting research and development activities, constructing a demonstration plant, and bolstering operational capabilities.
news.headline: Aduro Clean Technologies raised US$1.2M in public offering to support R&D, demo plant build, and operations.
Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi may travel to Moscow on Monday to meet Russian President Putin - Axios.

news.summary: Cutting-edge artificial intelligence technology is revolutionizing safety, reliability, and downtime reduction in asset-intensive industries. Innovapptive is introducing 15 AI agents designed to streamline frontline workflows and provide immediate insights. These agents aim to enhance safety measures, improve reliability, and minimize downtime in industrial operations.
news.headline: Innovapptive reveals 15 AI agents for industrial operations, improving safety, reliability, and reducing downtime.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, the New York State Trial Lawyers Association has declared Andrew Finkelstein, a distinguished trial attorney overseeing five leading law firms in New York and Massachusetts, as the President of the organization. Finkelstein's appointment marks a significant milestone for NYSTLA as he brings a wealth of experience and expertise to the role.
news.headline: Andrew Finkelstein becomes President of NYSTLA at gala attended by Rep. Dan Goldman, leading 5 law firms.

news.summary: The East Palo Alto community is the recipient of Emirates' initiatives to refurbish courts across the US, making it the second community to benefit. Thanks to Emirates' support, new tennis courts are being constructed and community facilities are being improved for youth. Emirates is also providing grants and scholarships to California, contributing to the upliftment of the community.
news.headline: Emirates partners with USTA Foundation to provide new tennis courts for East Palo Alto youth, part of wider support initiative.

news.summary: On March 4, 2025, CMB.TECH NV (trading as CMBT on NYSE and Euronext Brussels) shared a press release noting their arrangement of a bank syndicate to potentially refinance the existing debt of Golden Ocean Group Limited. This move signifies a strategic financial decision in managing the debt obligations of Golden Ocean.
news.headline: GOGL & CMB TECH secure $2 billion loan to refinance Golden Ocean's debt.

news.summary: On June 18, 2025, AGM Group Holdings Inc, a tech company listed on NASDAQ as AGMH, confirmed compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) regarding bid price requirements. The announcement comes following a Compliance Letter from Nasdaq received on the day. The letter, issued on June 9, 2025, by the Nasdaq Hearings Panel, verifies AGM Holdings' adherence to the bid price mandate. This development marks a significant step for the integrated technology firm specializing in high-performance hardware and computing equipment sales.
news.headline: AGM Group Holdings Inc. complies with Nasdaq's bid price requirement following Panel's decision on June 9, 2025.

news.summary: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals has disclosed a private placement offering of convertible preferred stock worth $3 million.
news.headline: Cyclacel Pharmaceuticals to offer $3 million convertible preferred stock in private placement.

news.summary: Today, The Ensign Group, Inc. disclosed that Christopher Christensen, Executive Chairman and board member, has given notice of his retirement effective September 1, 2025. Ensign, a company traded on Nasdaq under ENSG, oversees a network dedicated to skilled nursing, senior living, therapies, rehabilitative services, healthcare, and real estate. This decision marks the departure of a key figure in the company's leadership team.
news.headline: The Ensign Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: ENSG) of California announces retirement of Executive Chairman effective Sep 1, 2025.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Enigmatig Limited (NYSE American: EGG), a global consultancy firm specializing in cross-border licensing solutions, completed its initial public offering (IPO). The sole bookrunner on behalf of the underwriters has partially exercised the over-allotment option by buying an extra 160,000 shares of common stock from Enigmatig at the IPO price of US$5.00 per share. This move indicates strong investor interest in the company, and the additional shares sold amount to US$800,000.
news.headline: Enigmatig Limited closes US$15M IPO, including over-allotment option of 160,000 shares at $5.00 each.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. announced the granting of 48,731 restricted stock units of the company’s common stock to 26 newly hired non-executive officers. These awards, approved by the compensation committee, were granted under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on June 16, 2025. This move was deemed crucial in enticing new employees to join Ultragenyx, in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Ultragenyx is a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in creating and marketing innovative treatments for rare diseases. The company's stock trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol RARE.
news.headline: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical granted 48,731 restricted stock units to 26 new non-executive employees under an inducement plan.
Fed official predicts another rate cut in autumn.
Fed's Daly Suggests Tariff Concerns On Inflation Have Lessened Since Initial Announcement

news.summary: BXP, Inc., a leading developer, owner, and manager of top workplaces in the U.S., disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.98 per common stock share for the timeframe spanning April 1, 2025, to June 30, 2025. This dividend is slated for payment on July 31, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of the market close on June 30, 2025. BXP, Inc. (NYSE: BXP) holds the distinction of being the largest publicly traded entity in this sector.
news.headline: BXP declares a $0.98 per share quarterly dividend, payable on July 31, 2025 to shareholders of record as of June 30.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS), the initial U.S.-listed EV charging service firm in China, disclosed receiving written notification known as the "MVLS Notice" from the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq").
news.headline: NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) receives Nasdaq notice for minimum market value deficiency.
EUROPE ATTEMPTS TO PROVIDE AN OFF-RAMP TO IRAN IN GENEVA TALKS – NY TIMES
US bank deposits rose to $18.253 tln from $18.207 tln in the prior week.

news.summary: BorgWarner Inc. (NYSE: BWA) has scheduled a webcast to discuss their 2025 second quarter results, which will take place on July 31, 2025, at 9:30am Eastern Time. The webcast can be accessed live on their website at www.borgwarner.com/investors. This announcement was made on June 20, 2025, from Auburn Hills, Mich.
news.headline: BorgWarner to hold webcast on July 31 at 9:30am for Q2 results, accessible at www.borgwarner.com/investors.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, American Healthcare REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AHR) based in Irvine, California, revealed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share for the period ending June 30, 2025. Shareholders can expect to receive this cash distribution around July 18, 2025.
news.headline: American Healthcare REIT will pay a quarterly cash distribution of $0.25 per share for Q2 2025 on July 18.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Parke Bancorp, Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.18 per share for its stockholders. This dividend will be payable on July 18, 2025, to stockholders of record as of July 3, 2025. The Company's ticker symbol on NASDAQ is PKBK.
news.headline: Parke Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.18 per share cash dividend, payable on July 18, 2025 to stockholders of record on July 3.

news.summary: In San Francisco, California, Marin Software Incorporated (NASDAQ: MRIN) disclosed on June 17, 2025, that they were notified by Nasdaq that the company lacked a concrete plan to meet certain qualifications. Marin Software is known for its digital marketing software catering to performance-focused advertisers and agencies, and is now required to demonstrate a viable strategy to reach compliance. The specifics and further actions regarding this notification were not detailed in the announcement.
news.headline: Marin Software Inc. (NASDAQ: MRIN) notified of potential delisting from Nasdaq for not providing plan to achieve compliance.

news.summary: On June 16, 2025, Zenas BioPharma, Inc. based in Waltham, Mass., granted a non-qualified stock option to purchase 112,000 shares of its common stock to a new employee. The stock option was given as an inducement for the employee to join the company. Zenas is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focusing on autoimmune disease therapies and traded on Nasdaq under the symbol ZBIO. The grant was approved by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Zenas BioPharma grants 112,000 stock options to new employee under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) as inducement.

news.summary: The NYSE American had previously issued a warning about the same issue and has now released a new notice as the deficiency still existed as of March 31, 2025.
news.headline: AIM ImmunoTech (NYSE: AIM) received notice of noncompliance with stockholders' equity requirements on NYSE American as deficiency remained as of March 31, 2025, after a previous warning.
Fed's Daly: Additional softening in the labor market could easily turn into weakening. We can't let that happen.
Fed's Daly Suggests Watching Autumn For Potential Rate Cuts Instead Of July

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Diverse Logistics, a company under Argosy Private Equity, has successfully acquired Massiano Logistics. This marks Diverse's second significant acquisition following Argosy's investment in May. The acquisition highlights Diverse's strategic expansion in the logistics sector.
news.headline: Diverse Logistics, an Argosy Portfolio Company, acquires Massiano Logistics in its second strategic acquisition.

news.summary: In Downers Grove, Illinois, InvenTrust Properties Corp. (NYSE: IVT) revealed a 5% year-over-year rise in their cash distribution for the second quarter of 2025, now at $0.2377 per common stock share. This amount annualizes to $0.9508 per share and is scheduled to be distributed around July 15, 2025. The payment will go to shareholders recorded as of June 30, 2025. InvenTrust Properties Corp. is a distinguished company in the real estate sector.
news.headline: InvenTrust Properties Corp. (NYSE: IVT) raised Q2 2025 dividend by 5% to $0.2377/share, or $0.9508/share annually.
Fed's Daly: Unless I saw a faltering labor market, the fall looks more appropriate for a rate cut.
Fed's Daly Indicates Economic Fundamentals Suggest Possible Rate Cuts Soon

news.summary: Wintrust Financial Corporation, listed as WTFC on Nasdaq, is set to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter and year-to-date 2025 on Monday, July 21, 2025, after the market closure. The corporation will conduct a conference call the following day, July 22, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (CDT) to discuss these results.
news.headline: Wintrust Financial Corp to release Second Quarter and Year-to-Date 2025 earnings on July 21, 2025; conference call on July 22 at 10am.

news.summary: National Healthcare Properties, Inc. (NHP) announced on June 20, 2025, that it has declared quarterly dividends on its preferred stock. For its 7.375% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock (NHPAP), a dividend of $0.4609375 per share was declared, payable on July 15, 2025, to shareholders of record on July 3, 2025. Similarly, for the 7.125% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock (NHPBP), a dividend of $0.4453125 per share was declared, also payable on July 15, 2025, to holders of record on July 3, 2025.
news.headline: National Healthcare Properties declares dividends: $0.4609375/share for Series A preferred stock, $0.4453125/share for Series B stock.

Fed's Daly: I look more to the fall, rather than July, for a possible rate cut.

Fed's Daly: We can't wait so long before fundamentals necessitate cuts.

news.summary: Boston Omaha Corporation (NYSE: BOC) has disclosed that its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will take place on August 25, 2025, at The Salvation Army Omaha Kroc Center – Joyce Mammel Assembly Hall, located at 2825 Y Street, Omaha, NE 68107. The meeting is set to start at 10:00 a.m. Central Time and will only be held in person, with no remote streaming available.
news.headline: 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders for Boston Omaha Corporation set for August 25, 2025 in Omaha, NE.

news.summary: Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. (TSXV: MNC; MNC.PR.A) provided an update on the management cease trade order (MCTO) granted on May 9, 2025, by the Alberta Securities Commission. The MCTO was issued due to the Company's inability to file its audited annual financial statements, management’s discussion and analysis, and related certifications for the year ended December 31, 2024, by the April 30, 2025 deadline, as required by securities laws. The Company does not anticipate filing the documents by the MCTO deadline of June 30, 2025.
news.headline: Magnetic North Acquisition Corp. updates on management cease trade order from ASC due to missing financial filings. Deadline not likely met.

news.summary: The COVID-19 pandemic continues to impact countries around the world. As of the latest update, there have been over 200,000 confirmed cases globally, with the death toll surpassing 8,000. In the United States alone, there are now more than 10,000 confirmed cases, and the number of cases is rapidly increasing. The government has implemented strict measures, including travel restrictions and social distancing guidelines, to try to contain the spread of the virus. Hospitals are facing challenges with a surge in patients, leading to shortages of essential medical supplies. Experts are urging the public to follow safety precautions and stay informed as the situation develops.
news.headline: AI influx may reshape digital asset business, bringing new opportunities and challenges to the market.
Fed's Daly: There are many possibilities on how much of the tariffs pass through to consumers.

news.summary: A conference call and webcast are scheduled for Monday, June 23, 2025, starting at 8:00 am Eastern Daylight Time (EDT). The event is set to provide updates and insights to participants on various important topics. Attendees should mark their calendars and ensure they are available to join the call promptly at the designated time.
news.headline: Larimar Therapeutics to hold regulatory update call on Nomlabofusp for Friedreich’s Ataxia on June 23, 2025, at 8:00 am EDT.

news.summary: A car manufacturing company announced yesterday that they will be investing $1 billion to build a new factory in the Midwest, creating 2,000 jobs in the region. The factory is expected to be operational in two years and will produce electric vehicles. This investment is part of the company's plan to expand their line of sustainable products and reduce their carbon footprint. The company's CEO highlighted their commitment to innovation and environmental responsibility in this new project.
news.headline: Investor event by ArriVent on Firmonertinib's pathway for EGFR PACC mutant NSCLC treatment.

news.summary: Springfield, Missouri-based Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: GSBC) will release its second quarter preliminary earnings on Wednesday, July 16, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call regarding the earnings is scheduled for Thursday, July 17, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. CT (3:00 p.m. ET). Great Southern Bank, the company's subsidiary, will provide a detailed report on its financial performance during this call. Investors and analysts are eagerly awaiting these updates.
news.headline: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: GSBC) to announce Q2 preliminary earnings on July 16, 2025, and hold conference call on July 17 at 2:00 PM Central Time.

Fed's Daly: We have to continue to watch policies going forward.
